hashtags.title: Hashtags to Scrape
hashtags.description: List of Instagram hashtags (without #) to scrape posts from

maxPostsPerHashtag.title: Max Posts per Hashtag
maxPostsPerHashtag.description: Maximum number of posts to collect from each hashtag (default: 10)

maxCommentsPerPost.title: Max Comments per Post
maxCommentsPerPost.description: Maximum top comments to extract from each post (default: 5)

maxScrolls.title: Max Scrolls
maxScrolls.description: Number of times to scroll the feed to load posts (default: 5)
